positive: A majestic celestial garden scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and root systems interwoven with geometric constellations. The main composition should be a central, symmetrical arrangement of glowing vines, crystalized flowers, and abstract nebula elements. Use a high-contrast palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, luminous gold, and pops of ethereal lavender. The style is elegant, neo-art deco mystical botanical, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong volumetric lighting. The artwork must look like a single, cohesive print transfer, optimized for apparel placement, with hard edges and no gradient fuzziness. --ar 1:1 --style graphic novel --v 6.0
